project.name: BotStore
project.scope_context: Progress since last GPT Pro final-mile plan (OpenClaw-first reference runtime hardening)

commits.title: Add install-attempt v2 flow with digest-pinned pack versions
Add phase-2 telemetry entities and outcome-v2 quarantine enforcement
Add safe exploration, structured policy explanations, and replay analytics hooks
Add Pack Spec v1 and Adapter Contract v1 draft docs
Add BotStore Policy Spec evaluate endpoint and structured policy DSL models
Add policy bundle registry, decision-log export, and stricter promotion gates
Add control-plane status KPI endpoint and migration handoff report
Add end-to-end control-plane smoke test script
Add OpenClaw reference adapter, smoke flow, and phase-1 integration artifacts
Add install target/activation controls and approval checkpoint pause-resume flow
Add approval checkpoints, install target controls, and rollback receipt endpoint
Add tenant policy profiles and enforce target/mode autonomy constraints
Add OpenClaw conformance harness script and docs wiring
Add phase-1 exit checker and OpenClaw conformance exit criteria
Add conformance burn-in and phase-1 go/no-go readiness tooling
Add one-shot phase-1 finalization packet script
Fix conformance harness reliability and publish phase-1 finalization evidence

key_behavior: InstallAttempt as canonical transaction join key
Capabilities/scopes/actions split in version manifest model
Per-call action authorization with signed grant option
Tenant policy profile constraints enforced at install-v2
Approval pause/resume checkpoints for lane-safe continuation

design_constraints: Sensitive action path must be typed and authorized
No trust on raw shell/browser inference for sensitive scopes

reliability_fixes_during_finalization.issue: control_plane_smoke json parser used heredoc/stdin incorrectly
reliability_fixes_during_finalization.fix: json_get now accepts explicit payload argument and parses safely

reliability_fixes_during_finalization.issue: runtime band ranking failed on enum stringification (e.g., RuntimeBand.B)
tenant profile enum values persisted as class-string tokens causing false denies
reliability_fixes_during_finalization.fix: tenant profile write/read now normalized through _enum_token

reliability_fixes_during_finalization.issue: conformance script Python interpolation broke on backticks/JSON
reliability_fixes_during_finalization.fix: switched to temp-file JSON loading before Python assembly

phase_2_and_3: Mandatory OCI/cosign/SBOM/attestation gates at install path
Expanded conformance matrix and secondary runtime certification levels
Policy ops maturity (staged rollout/rollback automation + SLO-driven rollback)
Reranker maturation with robust offline estimators (IPS/DR) after sufficient randomized data
